templates.name: default
templates.title: Blank Starter
templates.description: A minimal starter with a dashboard, example collection, and seed script.
templates.starter_prompt:
I want to build an app for [describe what you're building, e.g. "tracking customer orders", "managing support tickets", "expense approvals"]. Here's what I need:

1. Replace the example collection with the right collections and fields for my domain.
2. A dashboard with key stats and a recent items table.
3. A list page with filters, search, and pagination that links to detail pages.
4. A detail page with an edit form and status actions (approve/reject/archive).
5. Seed data so I can test right away.
6. Any automations needed for AI processing, calculations, or notifications.

templates.name: invoice-processing
templates.title: Invoice Processing
templates.description: Upload invoices, extract data with AI, review and approve.
templates.starter_prompt:
I want an invoice processing app. Users upload invoice documents (PDFs, images) and AI automatically extracts the vendor, amounts, line items, and dates. Extracted invoices go into a review queue where I can correct any mistakes, then approve or reject them.

I also need:
- A dashboard showing invoice counts by status and recent activity
- Vendor and GL account management in settings
- An audit trail for all changes
- Seed data with sample vendors, GL accounts, and demo invoices

templates.name: payroll-journal-entry
templates.title: Payroll Journal Entry
templates.description: Upload payroll reports, extract data with AI, review and post journal entries.
templates.starter_prompt:
I want an app to process payroll journal entries. Upload a payroll report (PDF or CSV), have AI read it and generate the debit/credit journal lines with account codes and departments, then review and post.

I also need:
- A dashboard showing payroll runs by status
- A detail page showing the uploaded report alongside the journal entry table, with balance validation
- GL account management in settings
- Seed data with sample GL accounts and demo payroll runs

templates.name: fixed-asset-tracker
templates.title: Fixed Asset Tracker
templates.description: Track fixed assets, calculate depreciation, and manage disposals with automated journal entries.
templates.starter_prompt:
I want a fixed asset tracking app. Maintain an asset register with categories (equipment, vehicles, software, etc.), run monthly depreciation (straight-line or declining balance), view depreciation schedules, and handle disposals with gain/loss tracking.

I also need:
- A dashboard showing net book value, asset counts, and a category breakdown
- Asset list with filters by status and category
- Asset detail page with financials, depreciation schedule, and dispose/depreciate actions
- GL account management in settings
- Seed data with assets across different categories and some depreciation history

templates.name: collections-agent
templates.title: Collections Agent
templates.description: Monitor overdue accounts, assess risk with AI, draft collection emails, and track payments.
templates.starter_prompt:
I want an AR collections app. Monitor overdue customer accounts, use AI to assess risk and draft collection emails, record payments, and track everything in an audit log.

I also need:
- A dashboard with total outstanding, AR aging summary, and priority customers
- A worklist page sorted by risk score with buttons to run AI assessment and draft emails
- Customer detail with tabs for invoices, activity log, and payments
- Payment recording that auto-applies to oldest invoices first
- Settings for reminder templates and escalation rules
- Seed data with customers, invoices across aging buckets, and payment history
